rules.title: Revoked check always blocks
rules.intent: REVOKED CHECK: Before any action, check revoked storage tokens and IP addresses. If user is revoked, block all actions and do not allow attendance.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Keep the device blocked. Do not register attendance or help submission until a valid re-enable review is completed.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: revoked fingerprints/IPs must be blocked from attendance actions.

examples: Fingerprint token is listed in revoked storage.

rules.title: Proxy or friend attempt
rules.intent: PROXY/FRIEND ATTEMPT DETECTION: If fingerprint/IP exists but matric or identity is inconsistent, block attendance and flag as suspicious.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Block attendance and flag as suspicious. Do not allow automated or manual attendance until identity is verified.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: device identity conflicts with matric/user identity.

examples: Same fingerprint appears tied to different matrics for the same course window.

rules.title: Invalid course reference
rules.intent: INVALID FLOW: If course does not exist in configured catalog, block auto-write and mark invalid course.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Requested course is not configured. Ask student to select a valid course and resubmit.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: requested course does not exist in configured catalog.

examples: Ticket references a course not found in course.json.

rules.title: Inactive course reference
rules.intent: INVALID FLOW: If course exists but is not active for attendance now, block write and require review.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Requested course is not active for this session. Verify schedule before attendance write.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: requested course is not currently active.

examples: Student submitted for Group 14 while active course is Group 2.

rules.title: Missing identity linkage
rules.intent: PRIMARY VALIDATION: If fingerprint/IP identity keys are missing, stop automation and require manual verification.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Fingerprint/IP missing. Require manual verification before attendance write.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: missing fingerprint or IP for policy-safe attendance automation.

examples: Support ticket has empty fingerprint or unknown IP.

rules.title: Attendance already complete
rules.intent: SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION: If valid check-in and check-out already exist, reject further attendance actions for today.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Attendance is already complete for today. Do not write another attendance entry.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: valid check-in and check-out already exist.

examples: Both check-in and check-out are already recorded, but user submits another request.

rules.title: Checkout without checkin
rules.intent: DOUBLE ACTION CONTROL: If checkout is requested without prior check-in, reject and notify invalid action flow.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Reject checkout because no prior check-in exists for this course today.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: checkout attempted before a valid check-in.

examples: User requests checkout first with no matching check-in log.

rules.title: Check-in only treated as success
rules.intent: CHECK-IN ONLY SUCCESS MODE: If check-in exists without checkout and checkin_only_counts_as_success is enabled, do not classify this as failed. Resolve as successful check-in state unless user is explicitly requesting checkout.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Treat this as a successful check-in state. Do not push to failed attempts; advise checkout only if needed later.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: check-in-only is configured to count as success.

examples: Student has a valid check-in for this course/day and no checkout yet, with checkin_only_counts_as_success enabled.

rules.title: Duplicate checkin
rules.intent: DUPLICATE ATTENDANCE: If check-in already exists for the same course on the same day and another check-in is requested, reject duplicate attempt.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Reject duplicate check-in for this course today. Attendance log should remain unchanged.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: second check-in attempt detected for the same course on the same day.

examples: Student already checked in and submits check-in again.

rules.title: Duplicate checkout
rules.intent: DUPLICATE ATTENDANCE: If checkout already exists and another checkout is requested, reject duplicate attempt.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Reject duplicate checkout. Attendance log should remain unchanged.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: second checkout attempt detected.

examples: Student already checked out and submits checkout again.

rules.title: New device controlled review
rules.intent: NEW DEVICE RULE: If fingerprint and IP do not match prior logs, treat as new/suspicious and require controlled admin review.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Treat as a new device. Do not auto-approve immediately; continue with controlled validation before any attendance write.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: fingerprint and IP are not found in recent logs.

examples: Both fingerprint and IP are unseen for this student context.

rules.title: Controlled assistance for checkin
rules.intent: CONTROLLED ASSISTANCE: If not revoked, not duplicate, and request is legitimate, allow guarded attendance recovery for check-in.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: User passed Sentinel checks. Guarded attendance recovery for check-in is allowed.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: legitimate check-in failure eligible for controlled assistance.

examples: Known-good student could not complete check-in due to transient issue.

rules.title: Controlled assistance for checkout
rules.intent: FAILED SUBMISSION RECOVERY: If checkout is requested by a valid non-revoked user with prior check-in and no checkout yet, allow guarded checkout recovery.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: User passed Sentinel checks. Guarded attendance recovery for checkout is allowed.
outcome.reason: Sentinel policy: legitimate checkout failure eligible for controlled assistance.

examples: Valid check-in exists, but checkout failed due to a transient issue.
